story.text:
# 💡 HyperDrive
**concept** · shared · knowledge

OASIS runtime layer. Auto-failover, auto-replication, auto-load balancing across providers. One API call can store holon on MongoDB, Solana, IPFS simultaneously.

## Edges in

- [[Holonic Architecture Whitepaper]] *defines* →
- [[Provider Abstraction]] *implements* →
- [[Holonic Architect ☯️🔷]] *persona_knows* →
